value_metric: before scaling each cohort, a Source-Year dashboard shows fetch/storage/AI/failure/manual-maintenance cost with the hard rule that an unknown cost is UNKNOWN not 0, and computes cost per 1000 artifacts and per accepted material event for the source-years whose costs are measured -- so scaling decisions are made on real cost, never on a fake 0

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: cost dashboard over the source-year grid; not wired to production; measured costs come from real Worker analytics / R2 usage keys / model counts when wired
